project_profile.style_description: hand-drawn watercolor, warm pastel Japanese healing island aesthetic, chibi proportions, organic shapes, paper texture overlay

forbidden_styles: text labels baked into character art

distinguishability_rules: All 20 regular tiles must be visually distinct from one another when placed in a 5x4 contact sheet at 128x128px — no two tiles may be confused at a glance

All 5 special tiles must carry a unique mechanic marker: wave=teal concentric rings, light_chain=sakura pink + gold chain links, pierce=orange + directional arrow, swap=golden + bidirectional swap arrows, cascade=dark green + sequential dots
No special tile marker motif may appear on any regular tile
Each regular tile silhouette must be readable as a distinct shape at 32x32px downscale
style_lock_rules: Hand-drawn watercolor texture visible on all tiles
No pure black outlines — outline must be primary color darkened 32%
Organic soft corner shapes — no sharp geometric edges
Paper texture overlay must be present at approximately 6% opacity
Ch1 tiles are at saturation stage s0 (8-15% saturation, 42-48% brightness) — desaturated but not grayscale, warm undertone visible
composition_rules: Subject centered in tile canvas with 8px bleed zone intact
Subject does not extend beyond effective 112px draw area (at 128px canvas)
Background must be transparent or neutral — no baked drop shadows crossing tile boundary
Top-left ambient lighting — no hard shadow crossing tile boundary
Single tile framing — tile represents single marine/island subject, not a scene
forbidden_failure_modes: TILE_IDENTICAL_SILHOUETTE: two or more regular tiles share the same silhouette shape
TILE_SPECIAL_MARKER_ABSENT: special tile lacks its required mechanic visual marker
TILE_SPECIAL_MARKER_SHARED: special tile marker motif appears on a regular tile
TILE_PURE_BLACK_OUTLINE: outline uses pure #000000
TILE_SUBJECT_CROPPED: subject extends beyond bleed zone
TILE_PHOTOREALISTIC: tile exhibits photorealistic rendering style
TILE_WRONG_SATURATION: ch1 tile significantly above s0 saturation target (>25% saturation)
TILE_DIMENSION_WRONG: tile canvas is not 128x128px (or 2x at 256x256px)

pivot_anchor_rules: Center-center pivot for all regular tiles
alpha_rules: No opaque white or grey background
runtime_import_rules: Must import cleanly into Cocos Creator 3.x
performance_budget: Max 512x512px source before downscale to 128x128px for atlas

contact_sheets: .allforai/game-design/art/tilesets/previews/ (existing preview directory — contact sheet to be generated)
preview_maps: 5x4 contact sheet of all 20 regular tiles at 128px
1x5 contact sheet of all 5 special blocks
animation_previews: frame_01 static evidence is acceptable for special blocks in this QA pass

repair_routes.action: regenerate with stronger distinguishing-feature prompt guidance
regenerate special block with explicit mechanic marker in positive prompt
regenerate to remove shared marker motif from regular tile
regenerate with tighter subject scale and explicit padding guidance
regenerate with stronger watercolor style negative prompt
re-export or regenerate at correct canvas size
regenerate with explicit outline color constraint
apply saturation correction or regenerate with ch1/s0 palette constraint

distinguishability_rules: Same character must be immediately identifiable across all 5 expression variants — hair style/color, clothing signature color, and body proportions must match

Each expression must be clearly readable: happy=visible smile/upturned eyes, thinking=tilted head/furrowed brow or finger-to-cheek, surprised=wide eyes/open mouth, react_jump=full body reaction energy visible even in bust/head crop, default=neutral relaxed

Different characters must not look interchangeable — each must carry signature identity markers: ritsu=rumpled shirt+relaxed hair, hinata=sakura pink+notebook visible or implied, kenzo=fisherman vest+grey sparse hair+weathered face, umeko=green apron+bun, natsuka=green vest+windswept hair, fuyuko=night blue kimono-style+upswept white hair, gicho=orange tabby cat
Character signature colors per spec must be present in costume: hinata=#F0C4C4, kenzo=#4A6D9A, umeko=#7DBE77, natsuka=#3D6645, fuyuko=#2A4060, gicho=#2A3650
style_lock_rules: Hand-drawn watercolor style consistent with tile family
Warm pastel palette — no neon or hyper-saturated colors
No text labels or dialogue baked into expression art
composition_rules: Character centered, full upper body visible (head to approximately waist)
No cropped limbs unless intentional at frame edge for animation
forbidden_failure_modes: EXPR_IDENTITY_DRIFT: same character looks like different person across expressions
EXPR_EMOTION_AMBIGUOUS: two different emotions indistinguishable from each other
EXPR_WRONG_CHAR: character does not match expected identity markers
EXPR_STYLE_BREAK: photorealistic, neon, or non-watercolor rendering
EXPR_TEXT_BAKED: text labels baked into artwork
EXPR_LIMBS_CROPPED: important limbs cut off unintentionally
EXPR_SIGNATURE_COLOR_ABSENT: character's required signature color not present in costume

pivot_anchor_rules: Center-bottom for full body; center-center for bust crop
runtime_import_rules: Must import into Cocos Creator 3.x without color issues
performance_budget: Source 1024x1024px is acceptable; atlas downscale to 256x256 render size

contact_sheets: Per-character 1x5 contact sheet showing all 5 emotions side by side

repair_routes.action: regenerate failed expressions with reference-locked identity prompt and character sheet ref
regenerate with stronger emotion-specific facial cue guidance
regenerate with corrected character description and signature color
regenerate with stronger watercolor style guidance and negative prompts
regenerate without text in prompt
regenerate with wider canvas framing guidance
regenerate with explicit costume color constraint in prompt

distinguishability_rules: Portrait must show face + shoulders, centered — face occupies at least 50% of canvas height
Character identity immediately recognizable from portrait crop alone
Portrait variant emotion matches its filename suffix (default=neutral, happy=smiling, react_jump=excited)
style_lock_rules: Same watercolor style as expression set
Portrait does not show chest below shoulder level
No background scene — neutral or gradient background only
Character signature color visible in crop area (hair color or clothing top)
composition_rules: Shoulders visible at bottom of crop
No extreme perspective or angle — front-facing or slight 3/4
forbidden_failure_modes: PORTRAIT_FACE_CROPPED: face is cut off at top or sides
PORTRAIT_WRONG_CROP: shows body below chest or excludes shoulder
PORTRAIT_IDENTITY_MISMATCH: portrait does not match expected character
PORTRAIT_DIMENSION_INCONSISTENT: portrait dimensions differ unexpectedly within same character set

performance_budget: Dimension inconsistency flagged: fuyuko_react_jump and hinata_happy are 512x512 while others are 1024x1024 — note as technical warning, verify intentional

contact_sheets: 1x10 portrait contact sheet or per-character grouping

repair_routes.action: regenerate with tighter head framing and explicit 'show full face and shoulders' guidance
regenerate with portrait crop specification in prompt
regenerate with correct character description
re-export at consistent 1024x1024px — minor unless crop differs

distinguishability_rules: idle: f01→f04 form a smooth breathing loop — f04 must visually transition back to f01 without jarring jump (pose similarity between f04 and f01)
happy: f01→f04 show progressive happiness escalation or bounce motion — distinct from idle
wave: f01→f04 show clear arm/paw wave motion arc progression across frames
surprised: f01→f03 show clear shock/surprise escalation — eyes wide, body reaction
Each animation set must be distinguishable from each other — idle≠happy≠wave≠surprised
style_lock_rules: Orange tabby cat identity consistent across all 15 frames — same fur color, same round body, same dark navy collar (#2A3650)
Canvas size consistent at 192x192px spec (source at 1024x1024 is acceptable for QA)
Sitting upright base pose maintained for idle and happy; wave shows arm/paw lift; surprised shows body reaction
Hand-drawn watercolor consistent across all frames
composition_rules: Cat body centered and consistently positioned across frames in the same animation set
No jarring position jump between frames
forbidden_failure_modes: ANIM_LOOP_BREAK: idle f04 has jarring discontinuity with idle f01 (would cause visible pop in loop)
ANIM_IDENTITY_DRIFT: cat looks different (wrong color/size/species) across frames
ANIM_MOTION_ABSENT: wave animation shows no visible paw/arm motion across 4 frames
ANIM_SETS_INDISTINCT: two animation sets (e.g. idle and happy) are visually indistinguishable
ANIM_POSITION_JUMP: subject position jumps discontinuously between adjacent frames

format_rules: PNG with alpha or consistent background
alpha_rules: Consistent background across all frames of same animation set
runtime_import_rules: Frame sequence importable into Cocos Creator 3.x at 12fps
performance_budget: 15 frames total; source 1024x1024 OK for review; export at 192x192 for atlas

contact_sheets: Per-animation-set contact strip: idle (4f), happy (4f), wave (4f), surprised (3f)
Frame numbered left-to-right in each strip
animation_previews: Contact strips showing frame sequence left-to-right

repair_routes.action: regenerate idle f04 to match f01 starting pose more closely
regenerate drifted frames with locked character reference and cat identity constraints
regenerate wave animation with explicit paw/arm motion arc guidance per frame
regenerate overlapping animation set with stronger emotion/pose differentiation
regenerate offending frame with consistent position guidance
